feature_policy.control: inventory-preserving label shuffle with signatures recomputed per shuffle
digit_signature_sources: compiled tape first-use and token counts when available

scope: 55 unordered pair cells; mechanical structural generator search only

verdict.conservative_read: Treat any hit as structural diagnostics only; the search does not produce or promote plaintext.
verdict.summary: No simple digit-signature formula clears the lossless, lookup-beating, control-separated bar.
